## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] Tests cover changed domain or storage behavior.
- [ ] I tested keyboard operation for changed controls.
- [ ] I checked light and dark themes for visible changes.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] This change adds no analytics, tracking, remote assets, or silent network calls.
- [ ] Fixtures, screenshots, logs, and documentation contain no personal data, private links, local paths, or credentials.
- [ ] Untrusted input remains bounded and validated.

## Visual changes

Add before-and-after screenshots with synthetic data, or write `Not applicable`.

## Notes

Call out limitations, follow-up work, or migration considerations.
